summary: Enterprise AI SaaS mobile app with multi-tenant workspaces, user authentication, project management, lead management, AI text generation, image analysis, and admin dashboard. Built with React + TypeScript frontend and Motoko backend on Internet Computer.
architectural_notes: Multi-tenant architecture: data isolated per tenant/workspace
Role-based access control: admin, company, and standard user roles
Rate limiting applied globally (100 requests per 15 minutes)
Redis caching used for project list queries (60s TTL)
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Sleek enterprise SaaS logo mark — abstract teal circuit-node symbol on dark background (enterprise-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Dark mobile login screen splash background — deep charcoal with subtle teal geometric grid lines (login-splash.dim_1080x1920.png)

existing_features.title: Build a mobile-first React frontend with a bottom navigation bar. Screens: Login/Register, Dashboard, Projects, Leads, Post Scheduler, AI Generator, Vision Analyzer. Use a sleek dark-mode enterprise theme with deep charcoal backgrounds, electric teal accents, and clean sans-serif typography. Apply consistent card-based layouts with subtle shadows and rounded corners throughout.

Build a Login and Register screen. Show email, password, role selector (admin/company/user), and workspace ID fields. On success, persist the session token in local state and redirect to the Dashboard. Show validation errors inline.

Build an Admin Dashboard screen that fetches and displays stat cards: Total Projects, Total Leads, Total Scheduled Posts, Total AI Generations. Use large numbers with icon indicators. Only visible to admin role.

Build a Projects screen with a list of workspace projects displayed as cards (name, status badge, client ID). Include a floating action button that opens a form to create a new project (name, clientId fields). Only admin and company roles can see the create button.

Build a Leads screen with a list of workspace leads displayed as cards (name, phone, source, status badge). Include a form to capture a new lead (name, phone, source fields). All authenticated users can add leads.

Build a Post Scheduler screen where admins can compose a post (platform selector: Instagram/Facebook/LinkedIn, content textarea, scheduled date-time picker) and submit to schedule it. List all scheduled posts in a card view with platform badge and status.

Build an AI Generator screen with a large text area for entering a prompt and a Generate button. Display the AI-generated response in a styled result card below. Show a loading spinner while the request is in progress.

Build a Vision Analyzer screen where users can upload an image from their device. Display a preview of the selected image and an Analyze button. Show the analysis result in a card below after submission. Show a loading state during processing.

new_feature_requests.summary: Multi-tenant workspace support with isolated data per organization
User authentication with registration, login, and role-based access control (admin, company, user)
Project management module (create, list projects with status)
Lead management module (capture leads with name, phone, source)
Social media auto-post scheduling engine (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn)
Vision/image analysis module (upload and analyze images)
Admin dashboard with analytics (total projects, total leads)

Create a Motoko backend actor that manages multi-tenant workspaces. Each workspace has an ID, name, and owner. Users are associated with a workspace and have a role: admin, company, or user. Store users with email, hashed password, role, and workspaceId. Expose functions: registerUser, loginUser (returns a session token), getMe.

Implement project management in the Motoko backend. Projects have id, name, clientId, status (pending/active/completed), and workspaceId. Expose createProject (admin/company only) and listProjects (all authenticated users, scoped to their workspace).

Implement lead management in the Motoko backend. Leads have id, name, phone, source, status (new/contacted/converted), and workspaceId. Expose createLead and listLeads scoped to the caller's workspace.

Implement a social media post scheduling engine in the Motoko backend. Scheduled posts have id, platform (Instagram/Facebook/LinkedIn), content, scheduledAt timestamp, status (pending/sent), and workspaceId. Expose schedulePost (admin only) and listScheduledPosts scoped to workspace.

Implement an AI text generation module in the Motoko backend. Expose a generateAIText function that accepts a prompt string and returns a simulated AI-generated response string. Require authentication to call this endpoint.
Implement an image/vision analysis module in the Motoko backend. Expose analyzeImage that accepts a base64-encoded image string and returns a simulated analysis result. Require authentication.

Implement an admin dashboard analytics function in the Motoko backend. Expose getDashboardStats (admin only) that returns totalProjects, totalLeads, totalScheduledPosts, and totalAIGenerations scoped to the caller's workspace.
Render the generated app logo and splash background as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated.
